metadata.title: Locations to Add
metadata.description: Locations extracted from character biographies and histories following strict filtering rules

locations.name: Bunker
locations.reasoning: Extracted from character biographies. Mentioned 2 time(s). Over the next 40 years, Alistaire transformed the Bunker into a crucial node in the Shrecknet, the Nosferatu information network, while maintaining the public fiction that he and his clan live in Mesa

evidence.excerpt: Over the next 40 years, Alistaire transformed the Bunker into a crucial node in the Shrecknet, the Nosferatu information network, while maintaining the public fiction that he and his clan live in Mesa
evidence.context: Over the next 40 years, Alistaire transformed the Bunker into a crucial node in the Shrecknet, the Nosferatu information network, while maintaining the public fiction that he and his clan live in Mesa storm drains

evidence.excerpt: He has become 'The Silent Authority of the Bunker'—a figure whose power derives not from visible displays of force, but from the knowledge he possesses and the strategic silence he maintains
evidence.context: He has become 'The Silent Authority of the Bunker'—a figure whose power derives not from visible displays of force, but from the knowledge he possesses and the strategic silence he maintains

locations.name: Hawthorn Estate
locations.reasoning: Extracted from character biographies. Mentioned 1 time(s). On the night the Prince dies at Hawthorn Estate, Eddy is already present, slipping in through a side door like he was following a lead. Specific estate location where the Prince died.

evidence.excerpt: On the night the Prince dies at Hawthorn Estate, Eddy is already present, slipping in through a side door like he was following a lead.
evidence.context: On the night the Prince dies at Hawthorn Estate, Eddy is already present, slipping in through a side door like he was following a lead.

locations.name: Phoenix Chantry
locations.reasoning: Extracted from character biographies. Mentioned 1 time(s). She claimed a warded suite within the Phoenix Chantry and turned her talents to the occult forensics of the Valley

evidence.excerpt: She claimed a warded suite within the Phoenix Chantry and turned her talents to the occult forensics of the Valley
evidence.context: She claimed a warded suite within the Phoenix Chantry and turned her talents to the occult forensics of the Valley

locations.name: Temple
locations.reasoning: Extracted from character biographies. Mentioned 1 time(s). Alessandro suspects the Temple is using the city's instability to expand its cult and experiment with stranger pacts in the desert nights. Context suggests this refers to 'the Temple' as shorthand for 'Setite Temple' - a specific physical location used by the Followers of Set.

evidence.excerpt: Alessandro suspects the Temple is using the city's instability to expand its cult and experiment with stranger pacts in the desert nights
evidence.context: Alessandro suspects the Temple is using the city's instability to expand its cult and experiment with stranger pacts in the desert nights

open_questions: Verify this refers to 'Setite Temple' and is a specific physical location rather than an abstract reference

locations.name: Valiant Detective Agency
locations.reasoning: Extracted from character biographies. Mentioned 1 time(s). He now runs the Valiant Detective Agency from a cramped office above a pawn shop on 7th and Van Buren. Specific business location with known address.

evidence.excerpt: He now runs the Valiant Detective Agency from a cramped office above a pawn shop on 7th and Van Buren
evidence.context: He now runs the Valiant Detective Agency from a cramped office above a pawn shop on 7th and Van Buren
